---
title: "Investigate APO and HOLO malaria targets"
format:
  html:
    code-fold: true
---

{{< include /includes/exercise_lig_mal_nav.html >}}

## Exercise

Excercise

<div class="download-buttons">
  <a href="https://github.com/obzehn/advanced_modelling_for_pharma/raw/main/material/PKG_APO_exercise.tar.gz" download="PKG_APO_exercise.tar.gz" class="btn">PKG APO</a>
  <a href="https://github.com/obzehn/advanced_modelling_for_pharma/raw/main/material/PKG_HOLO_1FB_exercise.tar.gz" download="PKG_HOLO_1FB_exercise.tar.gz" class="btn">PKG HOLO 1FB</a>
  <a href="https://github.com/obzehn/advanced_modelling_for_pharma/raw/main/material/PKG_HOLO_1TR_exercise.tar.gz" download="PKG_HOLO_1TR_exercise.tar.gz" class="btn">PKG HOLO 1TR</a>
  <a href="https://github.com/obzehn/advanced_modelling_for_pharma/raw/main/material/PKG_HOLO_ANP_exercise.tar.gz" download="PKG_HOLO_ANP_exercise.tar.gz" class="btn">PKG HOLO ANP</a>
</div>

<div class="nav-buttons">
  <a href="exercise_malaria_targets_index.qmd" class="nav-btn prev-btn">&larr; Previous</a>
  <a href="exercise_malaria_targets_index.qmd" class="nav-btn home-btn">Back to Beginning</a>
  <a href="exercise_malaria_targets_part_2.qmd" class="nav-btn next-btn">Next &rarr;</a>
</div>
